rationale: The current evidence is enough to draft a submission-oriented manuscript with bounded claims: P100/P101 symbol precision opt-in, P106 room extraction, P095 contains replay, and P108/P110 claim matrix.
P123/P124 show further selector compression has diminishing returns and should not block the paper draft.
The May 23 deadline requires manuscript assembly, figures/tables, and claim hygiene over additional open-ended model tuning.

paper_delivery_status.recommended_framing: audit-gated MoE raster floorplan scene-graph parsing with explicit policy handoff, target-level raster evidence, relation replay evidence, and transparent negative results
must_not_claim: industrial/real drawing generalization without reviewed labels
model-output contains relation robustness beyond available evidence

evidence_to_use.claim: P100 precision-sensitive symbol opt-in improves weak precision/inflation metrics
evidence_to_use.paper_use: main quantitative table; limited 74-row locked overlay subset

evidence_to_use.claim: P106 room/space mask-to-box repair is a positive image-only raster result
P095 contains relation opt-in passes expected-json/dev and secondary smoke validation
evidence_to_use.paper_use: relation-policy evidence with explicit oracle/expected-json boundary

evidence_to_use.claim: P123/P124 support-aware compression and lightweight selector do not pass gates
evidence_to_use.paper_use: negative evidence / bottleneck analysis; do not make it a main contribution

evidence_to_use.claim: P108/P110 provide claim boundaries and manuscript skeleton

day_by_day_plan.goal: Freeze claim boundaries and paper delivery plan

deliverables: paper/ or reports/vlm manuscript draft skeleton
blockers: Need final title/author/target journal preference if available

day_by_day_plan.goal: Draft methods and runtime contract sections

blockers: Need figure style preference if any
Need human decision on target journal and author order

allowed: small scripts that extract tables from existing JSON/MD artifacts
lightweight sanity checks for already completed results
defer_until_after_deadline: full public-raster inference if environment remains unstable

next_task.goal: Create the first manuscript draft outline and extract paper-ready metric tables from existing artifacts.
